vulnerabilities.description: Error messages may expose sensitive information during a failure when sending notifications.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Implement error handling mechanisms that provide generic error messages to users while logging detailed errors internally.

vulnerabilities.description: The currentCode does not validate the format of the task's recurrence object, which might lead to undefined behavior if the structure does not match expected values.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Add input validation for recurrence type and time format to ensure they conform to expected values.
